overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Western open-world game showing a character riding a horse through a desert landscape. The rider travels from open saguaro-dotted terrain into a narrow rocky canyon called Sidewinder Gulch, encountering wildlife along the way.

scene_state.functional_zone: open desert trail with scattered saguaro cacti

events.description: pack of coyotes emerges from the left and crosses the dirt path

agents.ego_description: galloping on horseback through open desert terrain, approaching wildlife

notable_agents.action: pack of coyotes running across the path from left to right

entered.detail: tall saguaro cacti scattered across the desert landscape on both sides of the trail
distant mountain range forming the horizon backdrop
sandy dirt path winding through the desert with visible horse tracks

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a third-person view following a rider galloping on horseback through a wide-open desert landscape. Tall saguaro cacti dot the terrain on both sides while distant mountains frame the horizon. Around the 3-second mark, a pack of coyotes emerges from the left and crosses the dirt path in front of the rider.

scene_state.functional_zone: rolling desert hills with rock outcroppings

events.description: birds fly overhead in the clear blue sky

agents.ego_description: continuing to ride through open desert with scattered rock formations and sparse vegetation

entered.detail: large rock outcroppings and boulders appearing along the left side of the trail
birds flying high in the sky above the desert

segments.scene_description: The rider continues through open desert terrain where the landscape becomes rockier with fewer cacti. Large rock formations appear along the trail edges, and birds can be seen flying overhead in the clear sky. The saguaro cacti gradually disappear from view as the terrain shifts to more arid, rocky desert.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow rocky canyon passage with steep walls

events.description: terrain transitions from open desert to narrow canyon with high rock walls on both sides
game location text 'Sidewinder Gulch' appears at top of screen

agents.ego_description: navigating horse through narrow canyon passage with steep rock walls closing in on both sides

entered.detail: tall steep rock walls forming the left side of the narrow canyon passage
tall steep rock walls forming the right side of the narrow canyon passage

segments.scene_description: The rider enters a narrow canyon passage where high rock walls rise on both sides, creating an enclosed corridor. The open desert landscape gives way to steep canyon walls that cast shadows across the narrow trail. Near the end of the segment, the location text 'Sidewinder Gulch' appears on screen, identifying the canyon environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a wide-open desert plain into the enclosed depths of a rocky canyon. It begins with a rider galloping through a vast landscape dotted with tall saguaro cacti and framed by distant mountains, just as a pack of coyotes darts across the dirt path. As the rider continues, the terrain gradually shifts from sandy plains to a rockier environment where the cacti disappear and large stone formations emerge beneath a clear sky filled with flying birds. The scene then narrows as the rider enters a corridor of high rock walls that cast deep shadows across the trail, replacing the open horizon with steep cliffs. Finally, the camera follows the rider deeper into this enclosed passage as the text Sidewinder Gulch appears on screen to identify the location.
